title: Mount Rushmore — neural-comm tech idea + government risk (2022)
html:
Mount Rushmore — neural-comm tech idea + government risk (2022)

Source: 2022-09-15 Apple Note. Idea-capture: brainwave-based objective communication with explicit warning about government access.

TL;DR

  • The idea: figure out neuron-objective communication via brainwave tech → seamless mind-to-mind comm. Predates Yahir's first ChatGPT use by ~3 months; technical-product imagination already operating.
  • Adjacent risk: legal-field implications — "can essentially read peoples' minds. Can't let the government access this tech." Same reflex as later surveillance state critiques.
  • Title oddity: "Mount Rushmore" — likely capture-context (drove past it? was at the SD landmark on a road trip?), unrelated to the idea.
  • Idea-genre bucket: belongs with the neuro-tech and brain-bandwidth ideas in 2024 12 IDEAS and 2023 05 IDEAS dumps. Recurring theme = mind-bandwidth as a product surface.
  • Two-sentence note = pure idea-capture; no execution.

Connections

  • surveillance state
  • mindless human interface disruption
  • 2024 12 28 ideas
  • 2023 05 13 ideas
  • osu
